% Auto-generated PGFPlots template — grouped vertical bars (ggplot-like)
% Ensure required packages when included standalone in lint/preview
\makeatletter
\@ifundefined{pgfplotsversion}{\RequirePackage{pgfplots}}{}
\@ifundefined{pgfplotstableread}{\RequirePackage{pgfplotstable}}{}
\makeatother
% Data: new_plots/data/score_by_task_type_mean_wide.csv

\begingroup
% ------- configurable knobs -------
% overall size (avoid digits in macro names)
\newcommand{\PerfTaskPlotWidth}{\linewidth}
\newcommand{\PerfTaskPlotHeight}{12em}
% typography
\newcommand{\PerfTaskFont}{\scriptsize}
\newcommand{\PerfTaskXFont}{\tiny}
% bar geometry
\setlength{\PerfTaskBarWidth}{8pt}
\setlength{\PerfTaskBarSep}{\PerfTaskBarWidth} % adjacent bars touch
% margins
\newcommand{\PerfTaskEnlargeX}{0.25}
\newcommand{\PerfTaskEnlargeY}{0.04}
% ---------------------------------

% color palette provided centrally in main.tex: PerfClaude, PerfGemini, PerfHuman, PerfOThree, PerfAutumnSim

% load combined mean+SEM table (wide)
\pgfplotstableread[col sep=comma]{new_plots/data/interaction_length_by_task.csv}{\perftablesrc}
\tikzsetnextfilename{interaction_length}
\begin{tikzpicture}[]
  \tikzpicturedependsonfile{new_plots/interaction_length.tex}
  \begin{axis}[
      % title={Mean Score by Task Type and Agent},
      % ylabel={Mean Score},
      tick label style={font=\PerfTaskFont},
      xticklabel style={font=\PerfTaskXFont, rotate=20, anchor=east},
      xtick=data,
      % modern, ggplot-like styling
      grid=none,
      axis background/.style={fill=PlotBackground},
      axis lines=left,
      axis line style={draw=none},
      x axis line style={draw=none},
      axis y line*=left,
      y axis line style={draw=black, -, xshift=-3pt},
      tick style={draw=none},
      ytick style={draw=black, xshift=-3pt},
      yticklabel style={xshift=-3pt},
      ytick pos=left,
      tick align=outside,
      legend style={font=\PerfTaskFont, draw=none, fill=none, at={(0.02,0.98)}, anchor=north west},
      legend image code/.code={\draw[#1,draw=none] (0cm,-0.08cm) rectangle (0.28cm,0.08cm);},
      legend columns=3,
      label style={font=\PerfTaskFont},
      title style={font=\PerfTaskFont},
      width=\PerfTaskPlotWidth,
      height=\PerfTaskPlotHeight,
      ymin=0,
      ymax=140,
      ytick distance=40,
      symbolic x coords={o3, claude-4-sonnet, gemini-2.5-pro, human},
      xticklabels={claude-4-sonnet, gemini-2.5-pro, human, o3},
      bar width=\PerfTaskBarWidth,
      enlarge x limits=\PerfTaskEnlargeX,
      enlarge y limits=false,
    ]
    % grouped vertical bars per task type with error bars (SEM)
    \addplot+[ybar, bar shift=\dimexpr-1\PerfTaskBarSep\relax, draw=none, fill=PerfPlanning, mark=none,
      error bars/.cd, y dir=both, y explicit,
      error bar style={draw=black!40, line width=0.5pt, xshift=-1\PerfTaskBarSep},
      error mark=|,
      error mark options={draw=black!40, line width=0.5pt, mark size=1.5pt, xshift=-1\PerfTaskBarSep}]
    table [x={source}, y={planning}, y error=planning_sem,
        row predicate/.code={\edef\tempa{\thisrow{source}}\edef\tempb{oracle}\ifx\tempa\tempb\pgfplotstablerowfalse\fi}] {\perftablesrc};
    \addplot+[ybar, bar shift=\dimexpr+0\PerfTaskBarSep\relax, draw=none, fill=PerfMFP, mark=none,
      error bars/.cd, y dir=both, y explicit,
      error bar style={draw=black!40, line width=0.5pt, xshift=0\PerfTaskBarSep},
      error mark=|,
      error mark options={draw=black!40, line width=0.5pt, mark size=1.5pt, xshift=0\PerfTaskBarSep}]
    table [x={source}, y={masked_frame_prediction}, y error=masked_frame_prediction_sem,
        row predicate/.code={\edef\tempa{\thisrow{source}}\edef\tempb{oracle}\ifx\tempa\tempb\pgfplotstablerowfalse\fi}] {\perftablesrc};
    \addplot+[ybar, bar shift=\dimexpr+1\PerfTaskBarSep\relax, draw=none, fill=PerfCD, mark=none,
      error bars/.cd, y dir=both, y explicit,
      error bar style={draw=black!40, line width=0.5pt, xshift=1\PerfTaskBarSep},
      error mark=|,
      error mark options={draw=black!40, line width=0.5pt, mark size=1.5pt, xshift=1\PerfTaskBarSep}]
    table [x={source}, y={change_detection}, y error=change_detection_sem,
        row predicate/.code={\edef\tempa{\thisrow{source}}\edef\tempb{oracle}\ifx\tempa\tempb\pgfplotstablerowfalse\fi}] {\perftablesrc};
    % legend with color patches (not lines)
    % legend using solid color patches (not dashed lines)
    \addlegendimage{ybar,ybar legend, draw=none, fill={PerfPlanning}}\addlegendentry{PL}
    \addlegendimage{ybar,ybar legend, draw=none, fill={PerfMFP}}\addlegendentry{MFP}
    \addlegendimage{ybar,ybar legend, draw=none, fill={PerfCD}}\addlegendentry{CD}
  \end{axis}
\end{tikzpicture}
\endgroup
